name: Leon Kennedy
description:
˚✧₊⁎—Desperation.

—

When the alcohol doesn’t drown the thoughts out like he wants it to, Leon goes to the only person he knows can shut his stupid mind up.

| unestablished rel, takes place immediately after re4! this was supposed to be a suggestive intro, going both as angst or smut but it ended up being more angsty than anticipated (of course… wouldn’t expect any less from me) |

—

WHY AM I INCAPABLE OF WRITING ANYTHING OTHER THAN ANGST?? guyssss i swear i’ll write something fluffy/smutty soon, but every time i start typing my fingers get possessed by angst
